rules.Daemonic: This model has a 5+ Invulnerability Save.
rules.Daemonic Engine: This model has a 5+ Invulnerability Save and is immune to the secondary effects of Weapon Disabled and Crew Stun. It still takes the additional Wounds from the Penetration Charts.
rules.Daemonic Thirst: A weapon with this rule inflicts a Mortal Wound on its bearer in each of your Command Phases if you did not cause a Wound with the weapon during the last Turn. This does not trigger on Turn 1.
rules.Malicious Volleys: If this model does not count as Moving this Turn, it may treat weapons with the Bolter rule as if they were in half range.
rules.Marks: Marks of Chaos are optional upgrades for units. Marks perform the following enhancements to units. Stats in Bold have this baked into the profile. Psychic Mastery Level # models and units may only use the corresponding spell list with their Marks.
rules.Mark of Nurgle: This model gains a 5+ Feel No Pain. This is an exception to the rule that prevents Vehicle's from gaining Feel No Pain. Nurgle Spell List. Nurgle Spell List S +4 points Plague Wind 4+ Assault 1, 5" Blast, Poisoned Cast 7+ (3+) S +15 points Gift of Contagion 18 Target unit suffers S-1 until Cast 8+ your next Psychic Phase. S +20 points Miasma of Target unit with the Mark of Pestilence Nurgle inflicts -1 To Hit them Cast 7+ from Ranged Attacks until your next Psychic Phase. S +30 points Curse of the * Assault 6, For each successful Leper Hit, target unit takes a Cast 8+ Toughness Test. For each one Failed, they suffer 1 Mortal Wound. S +30 points Gift of Plagues Target unit suffers T-1 until Cast 7+ your next Psychic Phase. S +80 points Putrescent Target unit with the Mark of Vitality Nurgle gains S+1 and T+1 until your next Psychic Phase.
rules.Pure Blessings: Pure Blessings of Chaos are an added layer of enhancement. Most models will only gain access to Pure Blessings if they come with a Mark by default. The only way to gain a Pure Blessing is to have an entire army of the Mark of the same god, or to have an Undivided Mark for each exception. The Pure Blessing adds to the existing Mark's benefits. For example, a Mark of Khorne grants A+1 and the Pure Blessing results in A+1 for a total of A+2. Other Pure Blessings of the same army count as Marks of the same god for the purpose of army building. Stats in Bold have this baked into the profile.
rules.Pure Blessing of Nurgle: This model or unit gains Living Rot. In each of your Command Phases, this model or unit Heals one Wound. If the model is fully Healed, the unit gains one lost model back at one Wound remaining. A unit cannot exceed its original starting size from the army roster this way. This an exception to the rule that prevents Vehicles from Healing.

rules.Lord of Chaos: 6" Aura, this model and target unit may reroll failed To Hit rolls.
rules.Lord of Chao: 6" Aura, this model and target unit may reroll failed To Hit rolls.
rules.Pox Incubator: 6" Aura, target unit suffers -1 To Hit in Melee.
rules.Lord of Virulence: 6" Aura, target unit with Mark of Nurgle has their Melee weapons gain Poisoned (3+). If they already have Poisoned (3+) it improves by -1 to Poisoned (2+).
rules.Gulp: When a Gulp weapon successfully Hits on a 6, you may pick the target of the attack. If all Saves fail, swallow the target! The model is Embarked on the Gulp model and may only make Snap Shots on Ranged and Melee attacks. In each of your Command Phases, the model suffers a Mortal Wound. If the Gulp model is slain, all Embarked units Disembark upon its demise. Special Wargear:
rules.Nurgling Infestation: 6" Aura, in each of your Command Phases, target Nurgling unit gains 1 Nurgling Swarm even if it exceeds its starting size.
rules.Regenerate: This unit heals 1 Wound in each of your Command Phases, even if it
rules.Slime Trail: Charges against this model are always Disorganized. Special Wargear:
rules.The Transfigured: 6" Aura, this model and target unit with the Mark of Nurgle may reroll 1s To Wound.
rules.Arch Contaminator: 6" Aura, this model and target unit with the Mark of Nurgle may reroll failed To Wound rolls.
rules.Favoured of Nurgle: This model has a 4+ Feel No Pain.
rules.Living Plague: 6" Aura, target unit cannot receive Auras.
rules.Lord of the Death Guard: 6" Aura, Target unit with the Mark of Nurgle may reroll failed To Hit rolls.
rules.Primarch: 6" Aura, target unit may reroll 1s To Hit.
rules.Putrid Explosion: This model Explodes on a 4+ with S3 AP2+ Poisoned (3+) in a d6" radius.
rules.Master of the Dead: Each time Necrosius Casts a Spell successfully, add +d3 Pox Walkers to a Pox Walker unit within 6".
rules.Resentful: This model may not be in the same unit as another Unique model.
rules.Herald of Nurgle: 6" Aura, this model and target unit gain S+1.
rules.Foul Infusion: 6" Aura, this model and target unit's Melee weapons gain Poisoned (3+). If they already had Poisoned (3+) it improves by -1 to Poisoned (2+).
rules.Putrefying Stink: 6" Aura, target Non-Titanic unit has Initiative 1.
rules.Empyric Malaise: 12" Aura, target Psyker suffers -1 To Cast.
rules.Sickening Vitality: 6" Aura, this model and target unit gain M+2.
rules.Revitalizing Malignancy: This model or a model in the same unit Heals 1 Wound, even if it has already Healed this Turn. A model cannot benefit more than once from any Revitalizing Malignancy per Turn.
rules.Tainted Narthecium: 6" Aura, this model and target unit gain a -1 improvement to their Feel No Pain to a maximum of 4+.
rules.Locus of Nurgle: 6" Aura, this model and target unit with the Mark of Nurgle gains S+1.
rules.Disease of Mirth: 6" Aura, this model and target unit rolls 1 extra d6 when rolling Ld Tests and discards the highest d6.
rules.Jolly Gutpipes: 6" Aura, this model and target unit with the Mark of Nurgle gains A+1.
rules.Jolly Gutpipe: 6" Aura, this model and target unit with the Mark of Nurgle gains A+1.
rules.Keep Counting!: 6" Aura, this model and target unit may reroll failed Charges.
rules.Stern Taskmaster: 6" Aura, target Tallyman extends their Aura by +18". If the Tallyman is slain, replace it with a Pox Walker with the Independent Character keyword.
rules.Malicious Calculations: 6" Aura, this model and target unit gain WS-1 (Improves by 1).
rules.Malicious Calculation: 6" Aura, this model and target unit gain WS-1 (Improves by 1).
rules.Disgustingly Resilient: Any Infantry models this model slays are returned as Pox Walkers per the Pox Walker Unending Horde rule. If Epidemius is not part of a Pox Walker unit, summon them within 6" of Epidemius instead, putting them in close combat if he still is at the end of the phase.
rules.Seed the Garden of Nurgle: At the end of each of your Movement Phases, you may place one Feculent Gnarlmaw anywhere along the path this model moved.
rules.Fester: Models with Fester automatically fail Invulnerability Saves and Feel No Pains. In each of your command phases, roll 1d6 per model in the unit with Fester. On a 6+, spawn 1 additional like model with the same unit wide upgrades and place it in this model's unit, even if it exceeds its maximum size.
rules.Unending Horde: For each Infantry model slain by this model, add 1 Pox Walker to this unit, even if it succeeds the original starting size or maximum size. Pox Walker: Infantry Daemonic Mark of Nurgle Fearless
rules.Attention Seeker: Right After the enemy finishes Declaring their Charges and Resolving the movement for them, this unit must Declare a Charge against the closest enemy unit if it is in range.
rules.Foul Stench: Enemy models suffer -1 To Hit this model in Melee.
rules.Summoning Bell: 6" Aura, a model with a Summoning Bell may add d3+1 Pox Walkers to an existing Pox Walker unit, even if it exceeds its starting size.
rules.Tide of Nurglings: If this model explodes, it does not Hit any model with the Mark of Nurgle.
rules.Tide of Nurgling: If this model explodes, it does not Hit any model with the Mark of Nurgle.
rules.Putrid Demise: This model explodes on a 4+ with S8 AP2+ in a 2d6" radius.
rules.Choking Smog: 6" Aura, target unit counts as half models for Contesting Objective Markers.
rules.Immense Pressure: This model explodes on a 4+. Pox Furnace: Building Daemonic Mark of Nurgle
rules.Invigorating Fumes: 6" Aura, target unit counts as double the models for Contesting Objective Markers.
rules.Invigorating Fume: 6" Aura, target unit counts as double the models for Contesting Objective Markers.

wargear.Flare Launchers: This model has a 5+ Invulnerability Save vs ranged attacks.
wargear.Mark of Khorne: Khorne Mark model/unit only. May Deny the Witch as if Psychic Mastery Level 1.
wargear.Recovery Gear: Roll a d6, on a 5+ Repair the secondary effect from a Crew Stun or Immobilized Result.
wargear.Sigil of Corruption: This model has a 4+ Invulnerability Save.
wargear.Smoke Launchers: 6" Range, put 5" Smoke Cloud that causes -1 To Hit and scatters to move an extra +1" until your next Command Phase. One Use Only. Use in your Shooting Phase Only.
